title: Oncerum glareosum
uses: Oncerum glareosum is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region. Its roots and leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Oncerum glareosum is also used to treat digestive problems and as an expectorant. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Oncerum glareosum for medicinal purposes.
